/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/integration_tests.dir/test_db_connection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/integration_tests.dir/test_pool_api.cpp.o CMakeFiles/integration_tests.dir/test_tracker.cpp.o -o integration_tests  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest_main.a ../../src/tracker/libtracker_lib.a ../../src/pool/libpool_lib.a ../../src/api/libapi_lib.a ../../src/common/libcommon_lib.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a ../../src/tracker/libtracker_lib.a -lpq ../../src/pool/libpool_lib.a ../../src/common/libcommon_lib.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libspdlog.so.1.12.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfmt.so.9.1.0 -lcpp-httplib
